question: Crystallization-regime tracking at N=1055: is K_avg deceleration continuing?
expect: K_avg 3.05-3.10 (deceleration rate <0.001/L). Hub z >100. Sinks 25-27%. PA ratio <2.75x. Hub K_max >240.
actual: K_avg=3.19 (rate 0.00312/L — 5.4x acceleration from S454's 0.000583/L). Hub z=119.0. K_max=278. Sinks=25.4%. PA ratio=3.69x (was 2.75x). Gini z=26.3. Isolation z=7.4. Crystallization-era deceleration REVERSED.
diff: K_avg higher than predicted (3.19 vs 3.05-3.10). PA ratio prediction FALSIFIED (3.69x vs <2.75x). Rate acceleration UNEXPECTED (5.4x rebound). Hub z, sinks, K_max all CONFIRMED. 3/5 predictions confirmed, 2/5 falsified.

findings.key_change: L-526 overtook L-001 for #3 hub position (44 vs 41). New entrants in top-10: L-895(26), L-555(26), L-599(25).
findings.crystallization_diagnosis: S454 deceleration was temporary trough, not regime. Rate reverted to S403-era levels (0.003/L). Possible cause: DOMEX governance model (M1+M3+M4) produces higher cross-citation density than pre-governance era. M4 resolution-intent sessions (S456, S458, S460) are high-citation producers.

successor: S477 tracking (test: is rate reversion sustained or burst?)
